code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if not has_prev
    result = list.push(result, n)
    prev = n
    has_prev = true
  else if n != prev
    result = list.push(result, n)
    prev = n
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
while j < result.len()
  let v = match result.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
